title: Actually 3D Flowers & Plants
description: A Vanilla friendly resourcepack, which makes certain Flowers & Foliage in Minecraft more detailed and actually 3D! (3D Plants, 3D Sugar Cane, 3D Pumpkins, 3D Crops, 3D Bushes, 3D Mushrooms, 3D Fungi, 3D Grass, 3D Dead Bush, etc...)
body:
![Actually 3D Flowers & Plants logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2a8d4b505a2f233c515d22074e9ec251a262000.png)
____ ##
This is a standalone Foliage pack of
###
____ ###
**More details:**
This resourcepack aims to make flowers and plants in the game 3D in a unique, yet Vanilla friendly way. The blocks that are currently 3D-ified include: all the Crops, Nether Wart, all the Bushes, Pumpkins, all the Grass, the Poppy, Cornflower, Dandelion, Oxeye Daisy, Allium, the Tulips and the Sunflower, The Warped & Crimson Roots, The Nether Sprouts and more! The full list is in the image below
‎ ____ #
**The 3D Plant Showcase:**
(as of version 1.0)
‎ ![The Plant models showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae305acc43b63aeec51902adb6f66bc4a7a67581.png)
See the Gallery for more images!
____ ____ #
**Special Features**
What other stuff is here except for 3D models?
‎ **Moss Overhang on Every Block!** **Randomized Dead Bush models** **Randomized Sugar Cane models** **Randomized Grass models**
‎
